statement.en: Investigating early single-cell changes in aorta to unravel the mechanisms of vascular complications in pediatric diabetes
statement.summary: The full abstract for this thesis is available in the body of the thesis, and will be available when the embargo expires.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a provisional thesis title/abstract with embargoed content (full abstract unavailable). The research direction is stated but empirical validation, methodology, and findings are not yet accessible for evaluation. Classification as FLOWING reflects the preprint/pre-validation status and time-dependent availability of the actual claims.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 幼い血管は糖の重みで、細胞ひとつひとつが歌うように壊れていく。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 滑らかな血管の道が、微かな点のきらめきで、すでに変化し始めている。
